verdicts.reasoning: The description of the SP-API as a REST-based API for programmatic access to Amazon seller data is supported by the homepage content.
The URL provided for auth methods returns a 404 error, making it impossible to verify the claim.
The documentation confirms that developers can self-register and obtain credentials, aligning with the recorded value.
The SP-API is described as a modern REST-based API covering various product areas, confirming the recorded value.
The public documentation provides sufficient information for building applications today, confirming the buildability claim.
